title: Roblox Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Roblox delivered strong Q2 2024 earnings results with revenue exceeding guidance and bookings reaching over $955 million. The earnings call highlighted the company's robust user engagement across all age groups, with particular strength in the 13+ demographic. Daily active users reached 76.4 million, consistent with analyst expectations. Management discussed the platform's international expansion successes, particularly in emerging markets where user growth accelerated. Engagement hours of 16.63 billion demonstrated sustained platform stickiness. The company reported narrowing losses with per-share losses improving to approximately 37 cents from 46 cents in the year-ago quarter. Management emphasized the company's long-term monetization opportunities and expressed confidence in its ability to drive 20%+ annual revenue growth through 2027. During the call, executives highlighted investments in platform stability, developer tools, and safety features. Q2 2024 marked the first quarter where bookings exceeded $1 billion, a significant milestone for the company. Looking ahead, management reiterated mid-range bookings growth expectations while acknowledging competitive pressures and seasonal dynamics.
